2026-05-09.explanation: The TVM is TON's execution layer that runs compiled smart contract code (bytecode) on validators; the other options describe different blockchain components.

options.A: Execute smart contract bytecode on validator nodes
options.C: Manage the consensus mechanism between shards
options.D: Compress and archive historical blockchain data

2026-05-09.question: What is the primary purpose of the TVM (Ton Virtual Machine) in the TON blockchain?
